world.title: Iranian woman arrested in US over brokering sale of 'drones, bombs', others ammunition between Tehran and Sudan
world.summary: An Iranian woman was arrested in the U.S. for allegedly brokering the sale of drones, bombs, and ammunition between Tehran and Sudan. The company she operated, Shamim Mafi, reportedly received over $7 million in payments in 2025 for these transactions. She faces multiple charges related to the trafficking of weapons and ammunition.

world.title: Shamar Elkins posted concerning message about wife and marriage days before Louisiana shooting
world.summary: Shamar Elkins, the suspect in a Louisiana mass shooting, posted a troubling message about his wife and marriage on social media days prior to the incident. The shooting occurred in Shreveport, where multiple locations were targeted. Former Caddo Parish Constable Patrick Young confirmed Elkins' identity as the shooter, raising concerns about his mental state leading up to the event.

world.title: ‘Blew a hole in engine room’: Donald Trump claims US seized Iranian vessel TOUSKA in Strait of Hormuz
world.summary: US President Donald Trump announced that the U.S. Navy seized an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA in the Strait of Hormuz. He stated that the vessel attempted to bypass a naval blockade. The claim highlights ongoing tensions in the region, particularly concerning maritime security and the enforcement of sanctions against Iran. Further details on the incident remain unclear.

business.title: Razorpay set for confidential IPO filing; valuation may fall to around $5 billion
business.summary: Razorpay plans to file for a confidential IPO, with its valuation anticipated to drop to approximately $5 billion, down from $7.5 billion. The company may face scrutiny regarding its growth sustainability and profitability. This news follows Walmart-backed PhonePe's decision to pause its $1.3 billion IPO last month, citing concerns related to the ongoing conflict in West Asia.

business.title: Gold slumps below $4,800 on renewed Strait of Hormuz tensions
business.summary: Gold prices fell to approximately $4,775 during the early Asian session on Monday, influenced by escalating tensions between the United States and Iran regarding the Strait of Hormuz. Traders are closely monitoring the situation, which has contributed to the decline in gold's value. This drop reflects market reactions to geopolitical developments affecting global trade and security.

business.title: IEX shares in focus on Monday after this latest market coupling release by the CERC
business.summary: IEX shares are under scrutiny following the Appellate Tribunal for Electricity's dismissal of its petition against the CERC's market coupling directive from July 2025, which previously caused a 30% stock price drop. The CERC is seeking public feedback by May 16, 2026, and plans to release detailed market coupling procedures within the next six months.

technology.title: Microsoft Raises Surface PC Prices Amid Rising Memory Costs
technology.summary: Microsoft has increased prices for its Surface PC lineup due to rising costs of memory and essential components. This decision reflects the broader trend of escalating expenses in the tech market, potentially affecting consumer purchasing decisions. The price adjustments aim to address the financial pressures faced by the company while maintaining product quality and availability in a competitive landscape.

technology.title: Weekly deals: Galaxy A37 and A57 launch, but Galaxy S25 FE and Pixel 10a present a challenge
technology.summary: Samsung launched the Galaxy A37 and A57, but the Galaxy S25 FE and Pixel 10a pose competitive pricing challenges. The S25 FE is priced lower than the A57, while the Pixel 10a matches the A37's cost. Additionally, the article discusses the pricing of the Galaxy S25+ and S26+, highlighting recent price increases on various Samsung devices.

technology.title: Motorola Edge 70 Pro set to launch on April 22: Expected price, specs and more
technology.summary: Motorola is preparing to launch the Edge 70 Pro in India on April 22, expanding its Edge lineup. This new smartphone will complement the previously released Motorola Edge 70. While official specifications have not been disclosed, various leaks and rumors suggest features that may attract consumer interest. Further details are anticipated as the launch date approaches.

sports.title: Endrick impresses in Lyon’s 2-1 win over PSG
sports.summary: Real Madrid loanee Endrick played a pivotal role in Lyon's 2-1 victory over Paris Saint-Germain at Parc des Princes. He scored a remarkable goal and provided an assist within 11 minutes during the first half, showcasing his talent. This performance contributed significantly to Lyon's unexpected win against the reigning champions, highlighting Endrick's impact on the match.

sports.title: Afghanistan's Rashid Khan was offered Indian citizenship by 'high-ranking official'; here's how he responded
sports.summary: Afghanistan cricketer Rashid Khan received offers of citizenship from two countries, including India, allowing him to represent them. However, he declined these offers, opting instead to continue his career with the Afghan national team. This decision is detailed in a new book about his life and career, highlighting his commitment to his home country despite the opportunities presented.

sports.title: PBKS vs LSG Cricket Scorecard, 29th Match at New Chandigarh, April 19, 2026
sports.summary: Punjab Kings faced Lucknow Super Giants in the 29th match of IPL 2026 on April 19, 2026. Prabhsimran Singh was dismissed for a first-ball duck, caught off a delivery by Shami, who executed a perfect outswinger. The match took place in New Chandigarh, with live updates available on the cricket scoreboard for fans following the game.

health.title: Bengaluru sewage study shows COVID-19 tracks closely with cases but offers no early warning
health.summary: Researchers in Bengaluru found that monitoring sewage accurately reflects local COVID-19 outbreaks, particularly during the first Omicron wave. However, the study revealed that wastewater viral levels do not serve as an early warning system for impending clinical cases. The research was conducted by institutions including the International Centre for Theoretical Sciences and the Indian Institute of Science.

health.title: Pre-wedding vow of weight loss: Popping pills in rush to crush kilos
health.summary: In Lucknow, many brides and grooms are increasingly seeking rapid weight loss solutions ahead of their weddings. This trend includes consultations with doctors for quick weight-loss pills and programs. The focus on physical appearance is driving individuals and families to prioritize weight loss alongside traditional preparations like bridal lehengas and pre-wedding shoots, reflecting changing societal expectations.

health.title: Fatty liver cases in Mangaluru up by 10% in a decade: Doctor
health.summary: Fatty liver disease cases in Mangaluru have increased by 10% over the past decade, according to local doctors. Once deemed rare in children, it is now recognized as a common cause of chronic liver disease among this demographic. Dr. Swathi Rao, a consultant pediatric intensivist, highlighted these concerns during discussions for World Liver Day.

science.title: For years, scientists could not explain why oxygen-rich surface waters were releasing methane into the atmosphere, and now, researchers from the University of Rochester have solved the mystery, and th
science.summary: Researchers at the University of Rochester have identified the cause of methane release from oxygen-rich surface waters. The phenomenon is linked to bacteria that decompose organic matter in phosphate-deficient conditions. As ocean warming reduces nutrient mixing, this process may intensify, potentially leading to increased methane production and contributing to a cycle of environmental change.

science.title: NASA rover images and the “insect on Mars” claim: What science really says
science.summary: Recent claims of "winged insects" and predator-like life forms in images from NASA's Mars rovers have sparked intrigue and confusion among scientists. While the images have generated interest, experts emphasize that these interpretations may not reflect actual life on Mars. Further analysis is needed to understand the phenomena observed in the rover images and their implications for extraterrestrial life.

science.title: NASA Announces Lunar Base Plan With 73 Landings for Permanent Human Presence
science.summary: NASA has announced a comprehensive strategy to create a permanent human base on the Moon, detailing plans for 73 landing missions. This initiative is considered the most ambitious space endeavor since the Apollo program. The strategy aims to enhance lunar exploration and establish a sustainable human presence, marking a significant milestone in space exploration efforts.

entertainment.title: Horoscope Today: April 20, 2026
entertainment.summary: Horoscope for April 20, 2026, emphasizes Leo's qualities as a leader. A good Emperor balances war with enjoyment, showcasing intuition and self-assurance. Leo is encouraged to prioritize the well-being of others while focusing on personal growth and expansion. The stars suggest that embracing both responsibility and play can enhance the quality of life for Leo and those around them.

entertainment.title: Another title change takes place at WM 42 Sunday Night Two
entertainment.summary: Rhea Ripley became the new WWE Women’s Champion by defeating Jade Cargill at WrestleMania 42 on Sunday Night Two. The match featured interference from Michin, who distracted the referee, allowing B-Fab to pull Ripley down during a crucial moment. Despite a strong effort from Cargill, Ripley ultimately secured the victory and the championship title.

entertainment.title: Taurus Horoscope Today: April 20, 2026
entertainment.summary: Today, Taurus, you may reflect on past challenges or appreciate your current achievements. You are in a phase of creation, having put effort into your endeavors. While inner doubts and childhood memories may surface, focus on the positive aspects of your journey. Embrace the growth around you and acknowledge the progress you have made in your life.
